items.title: Employee Attrition Dashboard using Tableau
items.description:
This project focuses on understanding:
Overall attrition rate
Departments and job roles with higher attrition
The impact of age, income, and overtime on employee turnover

 Tools used: Excel (data prep) & Tableau (analysis + visualization)

This hands-on project strengthened my ability to translate HR data into actionable insights that can support better retention strategies.

items.title: Airbnb Listings Analysis (2016)
items.description:
I explored the pricing trends by bedrooms & zip codes, listing distribution, and revenue over time
I used Excel for data prep and Tableau for data visualization
This project strengthened my skills in data cleaning, dashboard design, and turning raw data into clear insights.

items.title: Online Community Growth Strategy
items.description: Led a content and engagement strategy that resulted in a 25% increase in social media interaction for an online academy.
